pr.title: Record: ParallelResiduals + MiniDepthRecurrence, 1.1063 BPB / 1.8679 nats, -0.0072 vs PR #1179, -0.0143 vs merged SOTA

output.summary: Combines parallel dual-lane residual routing from layer 7 with mid-training mini-depth recurrence (layers 4-5) and GPTQ mixed quantization.
techniques: Parallel residual lanes with learned read/write mixing from layer 7 onward
Mini depth recurrence on layers 4-5 enabled mid-training with untied MLPs
Autoregressive self-generated GPTQ mixed quantization pipeline
